ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "college_type" TEXT /* Type of college (e.g., in-state, out-of-state) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the college is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the college is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the college */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of the college */,
  "campus_setting" TEXT /* Campus setting (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuitions" (
  "tuition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "in_state_tuition" REAL /* In-state tuition cost */,
  "out_of_state_tuition" REAL /* Out-of-state tuition cost */,
  "room_board" REAL /* Room and board costs */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuitions_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "grad_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "grad_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate (in percentage) */,
  "grad_rate_4yr" REAL /* 4-year graduation rate (in percentage) */,
  "grad_rate_6yr" REAL /* 6-year graduation rate (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grad_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_on_investments" (
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  "roi_4yr" REAL /* ROI for 4-year programs */,
  "roi_6yr" REAL /* ROI for 6-year programs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_on_investments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aids" (
  "financial_aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "loan_amt" REAL /* Average loan amount */,
  "perc_grant" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving grants */,
  "perc_scholarship" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving scholarships */,
  "avg_family_income" REAL /* Average family income of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aids_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years_to_graduate" (
  "yrs2grad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each years to graduate record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "yrs2grad" INTEGER /* Number of years to graduate */,
  "yrs2grad_fulltime" INTEGER /* Number of years to graduate for full-time students */,
  "yrs2grad_parttime" INTEGER /* Number of years to graduate for part-time students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yrs2grad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_to_graduate_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "predicted_roi" REAL /* Predicted return on investment (ROI) */,
  "predicted_grad_rate" REAL /* Predicted graduation rate */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors_impacting_success" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "factor_value" REAL /* Value of the factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of factor (e.g., academic, financial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factors_impacting_success_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_author" TEXT /* Author of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_statistics_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_accreditations" (
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "accreditation_name" TEXT /* Name of the accrediting agency */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of accreditation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_accreditations_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)
